====[[Pokémon Black and White Versions 2|Pokémon Black 2 and White 2]]====
In {{2v2|Black|White|2}}, Bianca appears as Professor Juniper's assistant, giving the {{player}} their [[first partner Pokémon]]. She, after not seeing him for two years, also reunites with Cheren in [[Aspertia City]].

She appears several times throughout the game, generally running errands for Professor Juniper, such as looking for {{p|Tynamo}} in [[Chargestone Cave]]. She will accompany the player as a [[Multi Battle]] partner on the player's first visit to [[Reversal Mountain]] while she investigates the [[Legendary Pokémon]] {{p|Heatran}}. She also appears as a participant of the [[Mix Tournament]] at the [[Pokémon World Tournament]].

She can be called on the [[Xtransceiver]] to figure out the player's current [[friendship]] level with Pokémon in their party. After the player has defeated the {{pkmn|Champion}}, she can also figure out whether a Pokémon in the player's party has reached its effective cap in [[effort values]] for any stat (252), or overall (510).
